heading: Local island rules — in plain language
intro: Inhabited islands follow Maldivian and Islamic customs. None of this should be a surprise on arrival — we tell you upfront, and it's simple to plan around.
linkText: Read the full local island rules guide →

rules.label: Swimwear
rules.value: Bikini beach only, elsewhere modest dress

rules.label: Ramadan
rules.value: No eating/drinking in public during daylight

rules.label: Pets/pork
rules.value: Not permitted, in line with local custom
